item.title: Carrying water in a sieve
item.description: In this video I show you how to carry water in a sieve using hydrophobicity

media:content.media:title: Carrying water in a sieve
media:content.media:description: In this video I show you how to carry water in a sieve using hydrophobicity

item.title: Trapping an electron in a box
item.description: The Action Lab explores a physics experiment about trapping an electron in a box and what it can reveal about light and science.

media:content.media:title: Trapping an electron in a box
media:content.media:description: The Action Lab explores a physics experiment about trapping an electron in a box and what it can reveal about light and science.

item.title: Swimming in Syrup vs. Water
item.description: In this video I test out the proposition that swimming in syrup is as easy as swimming in water. Based on a research paper published at the University of Minnesota

media:content.media:title: Swimming in Syrup vs. Water
media:content.media:description: In this video I test out the proposition that swimming in syrup is as easy as swimming in water. Based on a research paper published at the University of Minnesota

item.title: Is negative mass possible?
item.description: In this video I show you a real experiment that shows how something with a negative mass reacts to a force applied to it. Then I talk about negative mass and if it really is a physical impossibility.

media:content.media:title: Is negative mass possible?
media:content.media:description: In this video I show you a real experiment that shows how something with a negative mass reacts to a force applied to it. Then I talk about negative mass and if it really is a physical impossibility.
